description_long: This is a futuristic, military-style airplane with an angular, stealth-inspired design and a matte olive-green exterior. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers sharply at both the nose and tail, with a cockpit canopy that is dark and appears heavily tinted. The wings are mid-mounted, swept back, and feature pronounced, angular winglets at the tips, giving the aircraft an aggressive profile. Twin engine nacelles are integrated beneath the wings, and the tail section is broad with a split, twin-vertical stabilizer configuration. The surface is mostly smooth with subtle panel lines and minimal visible markings, suggesting a focus on stealth and aerodynamics.
description: A futuristic, olive-green military airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, twin engines, and a split tail with twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular fuselage, swept wings, and integrated engine nacelles beneath the wings.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the broad wingspan, winglets, and the dark cockpit canopy at the front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the tail's split stabilizers and wing structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, wide tail section, and the exhausts of the engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept wings with pronounced angular winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated beneath the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a broad horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear not visibly deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy.
